---
title: The role of synoptic eddies in the tropospheric response to stratospheric variability
pagetitle: 2013-9-1-Domeisen2013 - Gang Chen
body-classes: publication-page
format:
  html:
    title-block-style: none
year: 2013
author: Daniela I. V. Domeisen, Lantao Sun and Gang Chen
venue: Geophysical Research Letters
venue_cit: <i>Geophysical Research Letters</i>, 40, 4933--4937, doi:10.1002/grl.50943.
recommended_citation: 'Daniela I. V. Domeisen, Lantao Sun and Gang Chen, 2013: The
  role of synoptic eddies in the tropospheric response to stratospheric variability,
  <i>Geophysical Research Letters</i>, 40, 4933--4937, doi:10.1002/grl.50943.'
paper_url: http://doi.wiley.com/10.1002/grl.50943
---

::: {.page-with-sidebar}

::: {.sidebar-col}
{{< include /_author-profile.qmd >}}
:::

::: {.content-col}

# The role of synoptic eddies in the tropospheric response to stratospheric variability

*Published in Geophysical Research Letters, 2013*

**Recommended citation:** Daniela I. V. Domeisen, Lantao Sun and Gang Chen, 2013: The role of synoptic eddies in the tropospheric response to stratospheric variability, <i>Geophysical Research Letters</i>, 40, 4933--4937, doi:10.1002/grl.50943.

[Download paper](http://doi.wiley.com/10.1002/grl.50943){target="_blank"}

:::

:::
